title: A Proverb
content:
Before you love,
    Learn to run through snow
    Leaving no footprint.

    From the Turkish.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator), titled "A Proverb", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
